title: Dithered Chunk Fade
description: A pack that changes the new chunk fade animation to a dithering effect
body:
# Dithered Chunk Fade  
A pack that changes the new chunk fade-in animation to a dithering effect!

![Midway through fade animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gccIyLki/images/f3b176aca652717955c8ab3514d405cb25eeab61.png)

Fun fact, according to Dinnerbone this is how the chunk fade originally looked!

## What versions?
25w43a only, however I will update this to 1.21.11 soon! Not possible to port to older versions or bedrock edition

Works with vanilla, sodium support maybe in the future
